Video.summary: Welcome to Week 3, Day 1 of the NCPA San Diego Regional 2025, live from the Barnes Tennis Center in the heart of San Diego, California. This highly anticipated state rivalry pits the UCLA Bruins against the SDSU Aztecs in a crucial best-of-seven collegiate team match.The match format prioritizes singles, with UCLA winning the coin toss and opting to start with Women's Singles. The broadcast features the Women's Singles match between Mae Lee (UCLA) and Emily Miller (SDSU), and the Men's Singles where SDSU's Preston Lynch takes a commanding early lead. The match also includes Gender Doubles, where SDSU (the Aztecs) took an early 3-0 lead in the overall match score. The winner of this pool play match gains a strong position for seeding, moving closer to securing one of the National Championship bids.
Video.title: NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UCLA vs. SDSU

Image.alt: NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UCLA vs. SDSU
NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UCLA vs. SDSU
NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UCLA vs. SDSU

Video.summary: Live from Bolton Arena in Greater Manchester, this Group A match at the English Nationals 2023 features Daniel Wren and Alex Woolf squaring off against Sebastien Malbois and Roberto Rospo. The teams bring a mix of controlled setups, powerful drives, and smart resets as they battle for an early advantage in the tournament.Expect sharp exchanges at the kitchen, tactical stacking, and impressive shot-making as both sides fight for momentum in this fast-paced men’s doubles opener.
Video.title: English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Open Group A Match 1 – Wren & Woolf vs Malbois & Rospo

Image.alt: English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Open Group A Match 1 – Wren & Woolf vs Malbois & Rospo
English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Open Group A Match 1 – Wren & Woolf vs Malbois & Rospo
English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Open Group A Match 1 – Wren & Woolf vs Malbois & Rospo

Video.summary: Day 7 of the World Pickleball League brings a critical and dramatic game between Mumbai Pickle Power and the Bengaluru Jawans. The game begins with a highly anticipated Men's Singles match featuring Mumbai's American star Brandon Lane against Bengaluru's Jack Foster. The match lives up to the hype, showcasing fierce action.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1

Video.summary: Catch the final showdown from the 2023 English Nationals as Mollie Kubrick-Finney and Thaddea Lock challenge reigning champs Antonella Giuliano and Pei Chun Kao. Featuring sharp angles, aggressive volleys, and expert analysis, this match crowns the best in British women’s doubles.
Video.title: English Nationals 2023 – Women’s Doubles Final – Giuliano & Kao vs Kubrick-Finney & Lock

Image.alt: English Nationals 2023 – Women’s Doubles Final – Giuliano & Kao vs Kubrick-Finney & Lock
English Nationals 2023 – Women’s Doubles Final – Giuliano & Kao vs Kubrick-Finney & Lock
English Nationals 2023 – Women’s Doubles Final – Giuliano & Kao vs Kubrick-Finney & Lock

Video.summary: With Ray Colaiacovo sitting in for Tim Ring, Dave Benz talks about the growing craze of pickleball and how Pickleball first arrived to the masses on national TV via the US Open Pickleball Championship.
Video.title: The U.S. Open of Pickleball and the beginning of Pickleball on national TV

Image.alt: The U.S. Open of Pickleball and the beginning of Pickleball on national TV
The U.S. Open of Pickleball and the beginning of Pickleball on national TV
The U.S. Open of Pickleball and the beginning of Pickleball on national TV

Video.summary: Kyle Yates & Andrei Daescu take on twin brothers Hunter Johnson & Yates Johnson for Gold
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Men's Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match

US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Men's Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Men's Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match

Video.summary: Day 2 of the World Pickleball League (WPBL) kicks off with an exciting matchup between the Hyderabad Superstars and the Bengaluru team. This matchup begins with a highly anticipated Men's Singles match: Hyderabad's local talent, Kuldeep Mahajan, faces Bengaluru's Jack Foster from the United States.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Bengaluru - Day 2 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Bengaluru - Day 2 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Bengaluru - Day 2 Tie 1

Video.summary: Welcome to Championship Sunday at the NCPA Utah Regional 2025. This Round of 16 Collegiate Team Match pits the 5th-seeded Utah Tech against the 12th-seeded, but formidable, Utah State squad. The action takes place at Club Pickleball USA in Orem, Utah. Both teams are competing for a coveted bid to the National Championship in Saint Louis, Missouri, which features a $30,000 prize pool.
Video.title: NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 1 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State

Image.alt: NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 1 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State
NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 1 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State
NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 1 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State

Video.summary: Live from Virginia Beach at the NCPA Virginia Regional 2025, the University of Virginia (UVA) faces off against High Point University in a crucial pool play match. With a bid to the National Championship in St. Louis on the line, these teams battle through a best-of-seven format.The episode kicks off with Women's Singles featuring Alexandra McDonald (UVA) and Sushi Bandaru (High Point), followed by an intense Men's Singles showdown between Eric Lee (UVA) and High Point's wild card, Freddy Ortmann. The action heats up in Men's Doubles with Cooper Duncan joining Ortmann, and Aiden Eggleston partnering with Lee. Watch for strategic mixed doubles play and see if High Point can force a sudden death dreambreaker.
Video.title: NCPA Virginia Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UVA vs. High Point

Image.alt: NCPA Virginia Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UVA vs. High Point
NCPA Virginia Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UVA vs. High Point
NCPA Virginia Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UVA vs. High Point

Video.summary: Welcome to Week 1, Day 1 of the NCPA Indiana Regional 2025, live from The Pickler in Noblesville. This crucial Collegiate Team Match features the University of Wisconsin Madison battling a developing Purdue University squad. This match is pool play for seeding, with teams competing for one of eight bids to the National Championship and a share of the $5,000 prize money.
Video.title: NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Team Match - University of Wisconsin Madison vs. Purdue University

Image.alt: NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Team Match - University of Wisconsin Madison vs. Purdue University
NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Team Match - University of Wisconsin Madison vs. Purdue University
NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Team Match - University of Wisconsin Madison vs. Purdue University

Video.summary: We are live in sunny San Diego for Week 3 of the NCPA San Diego Regional 2025. This high-stakes collegiate team match features the University of San Diego (USD) battling Grand Canyon University (GCU) in a best-of-seven series.The action includes intense Men's Doubles , Women's Singles , and Mixed Doubles as these teams compete for regional dominance. Watch top talent, including GCU's lefty powerhouse Adam Jones, who boasts a strong 5.6 singles rating , and his partner Xavier Cook Nakakuki. On the USD side, the episode highlights the partnership of Marcus Hopkins and Ryan, an impressive grad student player with high doubles ratings. USD’s Bella also shows grit in the women's singles match. This broadcast captures the best of college pickleball in an amazing format.
Video.title: NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - USD vs. GCU

Image.alt: NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - USD vs. GCU
NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - USD vs. GCU
NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - USD vs. GCU

Video.summary: The Kansas City Stingers face off against the Columbus Hotshots in a mixed NPL team match.
Video.title: Stingers vs Hotshots (Team Breaker)

Image.alt: Stingers vs Hotshots (Team Breaker)
Stingers vs Hotshots (Team Breaker)
Stingers vs Hotshots (Team Breaker)

Video.summary: It's Super Sunday on Day 3 of the World Pickleball League (WPL) as Game Number Five pits the Chennai Super Champs against the Delhi team (Dilwale) at the CCI Brabourne Stadium in Mumbai. The stakes are incredibly high as teams battle for the final semi-final spots.The action starts with the First Mixed Doubles match, featuring Chennai's coach, the legendary pro Joey Farias, teaming up with Anna Clarice. They face the formidable duo of Delhi's Willie Chung and Lauren Mercado. The match is a tactical masterclass, with Willie Chung noted for his consistent, pro-level reset game and Farias praised for his on-court intelligence.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Chennai vs. Delhi - Day 3 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Chennai vs. Delhi - Day 3 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Chennai vs. Delhi - Day 3 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Chennai vs. Delhi - Day 3 Tie 1

Video.summary: Commentators provide an inside look at Game 2 of the All Florida Pro League (AFPL) Stop 4 in Sarasota, Florida. The Fort Myers Flamingos get off to a dominant start, but the Jacksonville Ballers refuse to give up, staging a dramatic late-game comeback that tightens the score and mounts the pressure. This episode features key players like Stevie, Sophia Dorsey, and Maddalena, with highlights of their strategic plays and powerful shots. Tune in to see if the Flamingos can hold on to their lead and close out the game against the surging Ballers.
Video.title: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 2 - Jacksonville Ballers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Image.alt: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 2 - Jacksonville Ballers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 2 - Jacksonville Ballers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 2 - Jacksonville Ballers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Picklebowl 2022 - Mixed Doubles 2
Picklebowl 2022 - Mixed Doubles 2

Video.summary: This thrilling Group C matchup in the Men’s Doubles Open division features Edward Turney & Ben Cawston against Auto Stephens & Nick Hobbis. Filmed at the Bolton Arena during the 2023 English Nationals, the match showcases intense volleys, smart shot selection, and some of the best defensive play of the tournament. Don’t miss this showdown from the heart of England’s pickleball scene.
Video.title: English Nationals 2023 - Group C Match 2 - Turney/Cawston vs. Stephens/Hobbis

Image.alt: English Nationals 2023 - Group C Match 2 - Turney/Cawston vs. Stephens/Hobbis
English Nationals 2023 - Group C Match 2 - Turney/Cawston vs. Stephens/Hobbis
English Nationals 2023 - Group C Match 2 - Turney/Cawston vs. Stephens/Hobbis

Video.summary: December 19, 2023 - Welcome to The Orchard Cup - CHAMPIONSHIP NIGHT for season 2 of The Arizona Pickleball League! It's Tuesday Night Pickleball @ The Orchard, and tonight, the #1 seed Gilbert Gladiators (5-0) face the #2 seed Peoria Pythons (4-1).
Video.title: December 19, 2023 - Season 2 Championship - AZ PBL

Image.alt: December 19, 2023 - Season 2 Championship - AZ PBL
December 19, 2023 - Season 2 Championship - AZ PBL
December 19, 2023 - Season 2 Championship - AZ PBL

Video.summary: The 2025 European Pickleball Championships in Rome, Italy, concludes its first day with the historic Men's Singles Open Final under the floodlights. England's captain James Chaudry, the only active European player with a DUPR rating over 6.0, faces off against Poland's Bartosz Karbownik (referred to as Kabosnik/Kabashnik in audio).Chaudry dominates early with a mix of power and precise cross-court angles, taking the first game decisively. While Karbownik produces moments of brilliance, including a spectacular passing shot, he struggles with his footing on the clay surface. Witness Team England secure the gold medal in the inaugural singles event of the championships.
Video.title: Men's Singles Open Final - Chaudry vs. Karbownik

Image.alt: Men's Singles Open Final - Chaudry vs. Karbownik
Men's Singles Open Final - Chaudry vs. Karbownik
Men's Singles Open Final - Chaudry vs. Karbownik

Video.summary: Indiana’s Asplund and Safdar challenge Virginia’s Bieger and Singsank in the 2025 DUPR National Championship Mixed Doubles Final, showcasing elite collegiate pickleball skill and teamwork.
Video.title: Mixed Final - Indiana vs. Virginia

Image.alt: Mixed Final - Indiana vs. Virginia
Mixed Final - Indiana vs. Virginia
Mixed Final - Indiana vs. Virginia
